name: Refinitiv Eikon (Retired)
description_short: Eikon was retired by LSEG on June 30, 2025 and replaced by LSEG Workspace. This guide explains the migration, current product and pricing process.
description_long: Refinitiv Eikon is a retired product. LSEG withdrew all Eikon variants from sale on January 1, 2024 and ended existing-customer access after June 30, 2025. LSEG Workspace is the current successor. Pricing is not publicly listed and must be obtained from LSEG sales.

pricing.pricing_summary: Refinitiv Eikon is no longer sold. LSEG Workspace pricing is quote-based and depends on user role, datasets, exchange entitlements and workflow requirements. Contact LSEG for a current proposal.

tiers.name: LSEG Workspace
features: Dow Jones news for qualified users

pros: Modern successor to Eikon with desktop, browser and iOS access
Exclusive Reuters News plus professional data workflows
Workspace APIs and updated Office integrations
Customizable institutional research and trading workflows
cons: Not designed or priced for ordinary retail traders
Legacy Eikon COM and .NET workflows may require migration work
Data and exchange entitlements can make quotes difficult to compare
meta_title: Refinitiv Eikon Retired: LSEG Workspace Guide (2026)
meta_description: Refinitiv Eikon was retired on June 30, 2025. Learn what replaced it, how LSEG Workspace pricing works, and what former Eikon users need to migrate.

sources.label: LSEG Eikon withdrawal and Workspace transition
LSEG confirmation that Refinitiv and Eikon are retired
